entries.message: New Release Notes section added to admin reports — view, manage, and export a full history of platform updates
Folder template selection now populates correctly when creating documents from a template
Support link in sidebar now always shows as locked in production environment for all users
Fixed: Consultants were incorrectly blocked from saving incidents due to a missing permissions check — all consultants assigned to a site can now report incidents as expected
Standard consultants and clients can now update their own profile details (job title, department, phone, mobile, preferred contact) — name and email remain managed by administrators
Fixed a typo in the phone number example on the settings page — it was showing letters instead of numbers
Fixed: profile changes on the settings page were not reflected when navigating away and back — the updated details now appear immediately without needing a page refresh
Fixed: admins were blocked from saving their own profile with a 'sources required' error — the settings page no longer triggers this check when sources are not being changed
Updated the empty folder message in the template library to say 'There are currently no documents assigned to this folder' instead of a drag-and-drop instruction
Removed the Setup Wizard from the template library — the button and the full step-by-step wizard process have been taken out
The comments dialog on feedback entries now shows the original feedback message at the top, so you always know what you are replying to

Improved the error message shown when a file upload fails due to a timed-out session — users now see 'Your session has expired, please refresh the page and log back in' instead of a generic authentication error

Redesigned the Template Library page header to match the Training Library style — coloured icon badge on the left, and the Add Folder and Add Template buttons now appear at the top of the page on all three views (Templates, Files, and Folders)
Fixed: client users' company name was missing from the sidebar immediately after login and only appeared after a page refresh — all user profile data is now fully loaded as part of the login process
Fixed: pro consultants saw no selectable sources when creating a company — their assigned sources are now correctly available in the company creation form immediately after login

Admins can now permanently delete a case from the Cases list and an incident from the Incidents register — a confirmation dialog shows exactly what will be removed and requires typing DELETE before proceeding; existing audit history is preserved and a new audit entry is written recording who performed the deletion
